name: URL Screenshot
description: Any web page, at any scroll-depth, with custom CSS

inputs.label: URL
inputs.help: The page to capture. Captured at export time in a real browser engine.

inputs.label: Scroll depth
inputs.help: How far down the page to scroll before capturing. 0 = top, 1 = bottom.

inputs.label: Settle delay (ms)
inputs.help: Time to wait after load (and after scrolling) before the shot — lets fonts, images and animations settle.

inputs.label: Custom CSS
inputs.help: CSS injected into the page before the screenshot — e.g. hide a cookie banner (.cookie-bar { display: none }) or restyle elements.
